2026-03-18T10:29:24.2862287Z 
2026-03-18T10:29:24.2863328Z Agent: Now I see the root cause for the storage-blob failures. The test `stageBlockFromURL copy source blob as single block` calls `containerClient.setAccessPolicy("container")` which sets the container to have public access. This fails because the CI storage account has disabled public access at the account level.

This is a live-mode test that calls real Azure AD endpoints; the error is 100% service-side and **does not point to any code bug**. All 12 failures are \"recurring,\" meaning the issue predates the current HEAD.\n\n**Suggested fix:**\nNo code change is needed. The CI service principal's Teams-user resource must be re-provisioned or the test environment reconfigured by the Azure Communication Services team.
